subject: english
title: Letter A and First Sound Match
learningObjectives: Learner can say the /a/ sound aloud
Learner can match the /a/ sound to a familiar image

localization.defaultStepSupportText: Explain the task briefly in Hausa, then model the English target once before the learner answers.
notes: Keep Hausa support short so English still carries the learning target.

items.prompt: Point to the picture that starts with A.

promptTranslations.ha: Nuna hoton da yake farawa da A.

activitySteps.prompt: This is the letter A. It says /a/.
activitySteps.hint: Open your mouth wide and say /a/.
activitySteps.supportText: Ka nuna harafin A sannan ka sa ɗalibi ya maimaita sautin Turanci a hankali.

activitySteps.prompt: Tap the picture that starts with /a/.
activitySteps.retryFeedback: Listen again. Which word starts with /a/?
activitySteps.supportText: Ka tuna wa ɗalibi cewa yana neman hoton da yake fara sauti da /a/.

activitySteps.prompt: Drag each word to the matching picture zone.
activitySteps.successFeedback: Nice sorting. Each word matched the right picture.
activitySteps.supportText: Ka bayyana a Hausa yadda za a ja kowace kalma zuwa hoton da ya dace idan ɗalibi ya makale.

activities.prompt: This is the letter A. It says /a/.
Tap the picture that starts with /a/.
Drag each word to the matching picture zone.
